label: Build iteration: track add/change/swap/revert across turns; recall what changed and what state we're in.

messages.content: I'm building a notes app called Inkwell with React + Tailwind.
Now add a dark mode toggle in the header.
What was the most recent change I asked for?
I'm building a dashboard called Pulse with React and CSS modules.
Actually switch to Tailwind instead of CSS modules.
What change did I last request?
I'm building a project called Brewline.
Add a hero section with a coffee bean illustration.
Now add a 3-tier pricing table below the hero.
Actually, go back to the previous version.
Building an app called Tide.
Add a bottom nav with three tabs.
Now change the accent color to teal.
Add a profile screen with avatar upload.
What changes have we made so far?
Building Echo, a podcast app.
Add a player bar at the bottom.
Change the player to support variable speed.
Add a sleep timer.
How many changes have I requested?
I'm building Lattice, a CRM.
Add a contacts table with search and sort.
Now add a deal pipeline kanban view.
What was the first change I asked for?
